name: minecraft-automated-driver
description: MCP server that puts the Minecraft dev loop — build, test, launch, attach, screenshot, and semantic live control of clients and servers — behind one tool surface. Stdio only; loopback-only control plane; in-game agents disabled by default.
author: Fairy Fox (https://github.com/1fairyfox)
comment_coverage: Owner mandate 2026-07-22: coverage >= 90% is a GATE, not a goal — the test script fails below it, across lines/statements/functions/branches, scoped to src/ (scripts/ are repo tooling, test/ is the suite itself). c8 propagates NODE_V8_COVERAGE to child processes, so the spawned-stdio e2e test counts toward coverage of the entry-point guard.
comment_sdk: Pinned to the v1 line deliberately. SDK v2 (split @modelcontextprotocol/server / client packages) goes stable alongside the 2026-07-28 MCP spec; migrating is a planned, bounded refactor — see notes/plans/future.md. Do not mix v1 and v2.
comment_overrides: Force @hono/node-server >= 2.0.5 (transitive of the MCP SDK's optional HTTP transport, which we never use — stdio only) to clear GHSA-frvp-7c67-39w9 (Windows path traversal in serve-static). Kept clean per the no-parked-findings bar.
comment_future_deps: mineflayer (L2 protocol-bot lane) and vec3 join in Phase 5; they are NOT added early to keep the dependency surface honest. Prior-art pins live in the sibling despawned-items repo's package.json.
